name: Dhipaya Insurance Public Company Limited
summary: Dhipaya Insurance Public Company Limited provides non-life insurance products in Thailand. The company offers residential and general fire insurance products; marine insurance products; compulsory and voluntary motor insurance products; and personal, property, and third-party insurance products. It is also involved in investment activities. Dhipaya Insurance Public Company Limited was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
